FileSettingsInput.description: Path to XML file that will be calculated. FileSettings: The fileSettings, file name and directory, to use with an adapter for push and pull

FileSettingsOutput.description: Path to new file, if using txt endpoint. FileSettings: The fileSettings, file name and directory, to use with an adapter for push and pull

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
